TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: mzyugi' sun na Tayal hya' ga, aring sa ini' uwah na' qu Gipun hga, nanak yaquw mnwah mgaga' squ ryax na magal ina' ga nanu' si kiy min'aring mtalah lga yasa qu mutuw mzyugi'. mnhhway qmara', hmkuy tari', mstawput(msttazil) sun maha zyugi' na Tayal balay hya' ga, nanu' qu sun maha mnhhway qmara' ka yasa siy s'rux ini' 'nrawmul iyal, ruw mnhawhway mkura' tay 'zil, ini' ga tay 'llaw mshzi'. hmkuy tari' hya' ga mnrawmul cikay hwinuk naha' ru hkuzyun cikay qu tari', mkura' cikay tay glaing rmuruw squ phkngyan naha'. mstawput /msttazil hiya' ga, wiy mstawput tay 'zil, ini' ga mstawput tay 'llaw. cyugal qu gluw na zyugi' qani. Ana maki' sa ppzyugi' naha' ga, mtnaq kwara' qu ppstawput na zyugi' naha' hya'. nanu' iy mzyugi' ga, mutuw yaqu zyugi' na mnhhway qmara' qu tqs'un naha' pzyugi' ha, ruw yaqu zyugi' na hmkuy tari' qu spzyugi' naha' la, ruw pucing balay lga, nanu' yaqu mstawput /msttazil lqu spzyugi' naha' lma. Kruma' ga mutuw yaqu mnhhway qmara' squ hmkuy tari' nanak qu spzyugi' naha', ga ini' naha' ani pzyugi' qu mstawput /msttazil hya', ga kya uzi qu nanak yaqu mnhhway qmara' qani qu spzyugi' naha' nanak. nanu' mzyugi' nqu mstawput /msttazil ga mutuw siy ps'anak smi' sa hwinuk qba' naha', ru mluw squ hngzyang qwas qu yugi' naha', ruw. lawkah mstawput squ muwah pzyugi'. nanu' pzyugi' squ zyugi' hmkuy tari' ga, nanu' llayqun naha' qu kakay tay 'zil hru knrrngu' mstawput na kakay 'llaw, ru iyugun naha' lmayliq qu kakay tay 'llaw lga, knrrngu' mstawput na kakay tay 'zil, nanu' ps'ay'iyugun naha' pzyugi' na hmkuy tari' squ mstawput ru mngaygyut mkkura' tay 'llaw ini' ga mkkura' tay 'zil. pzyugi' qani ga mtbuci' mstawput mmlikuy squ kknayril, kruma' ga mngaygyut mtlibu' mtlingay kruma', ru mutuw sglaing mqwas nqu kya qu baq mqwas, ru glgan naha' pgruw mqwas tay suruw, kruma' ga pglgan naha' tlubuw na lubuw uzi kruma' mzyugi'. kinblaq ktan zyugi' na Tayal mzyugi' sun na Tayal hya' ga, aring sa ini' uwah na' qu Gipun hga, nanak yaquw mnwah mgaga' squ ryax na magal ina' ga nanu' si kiy min'aring mtalah lga yasa qu mutuw mzyugi'. sun maha zyugi' na Tayal balay hya' ga, nanu' qu sun maha mnhhway qmara' ka yasa siy s'rux ini' 'nrawmul iyal, ruw mnhawhway mkura' tay 'zil, ini' ga tay 'llaw mshzi'. hmkuy tari' hya' ga mnrawmul cikay hwinuk naha' ru hkuzyun cikay qu tari', mkura' cikay tay glaing rmuruw squ phkngyan naha'. mstawput /msttazil hiya' ga, wiy mstawput tay 'zil, ini' ga mstawput tay 'llaw. cyugal qu gluw na zyugi' qani. Ana maki' sa ppzyugi' naha' ga, mtnaq kwara' qu ppstawput na zyugi' naha' hya'. nanu' iy mzyugi' ga, mutuw yaqu zyugi' na mnhhway qmara' qu tqs'un naha' pzyugi' ha, ruw yaqu zyugi' na hmkuy tari' qu spzyugi' naha' la, ruw pucing balay lga, nanu' yaqu mstawput /msttazil lqu spzyugi' naha' lma. Kruma' ga mutuw yaqu mnhhway qmara' squ hmkuy tari' nanak qu spzyugi' naha', ga ini' naha' ani pzyugi' qu mstawput /msttazil hya', ga kya uzi qu nanak yaqu mnhhway qmara' qani qu spzyugi' naha' nanak. nanu' mzyugi' nqu mstawput /msttazil ga mutuw siy ps'anak smi' sa hwinuk qba' naha', ru mluw squ hngzyang qwas qu yugi' naha', ruw. lawkah mstawput squ muwah pzyugi'. nanu' pzyugi' squ zyugi' hmkuy tari' ga, nanu' llayqun naha' qu kakay tay 'zil hru knrrngu' mstawput na kakay 'llaw, ru iyugun naha' lmayliq qu kakay tay 'llaw lga, knrrngu' mstawput na kakay tay 'zil, nanu' ps'ay'iyugun naha' pzyugi' na hmkuy tari' squ mstawput ru mngaygyut mkkura' tay 'llaw ini' ga mkkura' tay 'zil. pzyugi' qani ga mtbuci' mstawput mmlikuy squ kknayril, kruma' ga mngaygyut mtlibu' mtlingay kruma', ru mutuw sglaing mqwas nqu kya qu baq mqwas, ru glgan naha' pgruw mqwas tay suruw, kruma' ga pglgan naha' tlubuw na lubuw uzi kruma' mzyugi'. kinblaq ktan zyugi' na Tayal zyugi' na Tayal qani hya' ga, mutuw naha' spgluw pzyugi' sa qwas, gaungat iyal qu spgluw naha' sa hngzyang na lubuw na mnnanak hya'. nanu' qu mutuw naha' spgluw sa zyugi' naha' ka lubuw hya' ga, nanak ya'qu lubuw na Tayal nanak ru ungat kwra' mnnanak na lubuw hya' la.
S.PHON: mzju…£i Ē s~…ēun na tajal ńßja Ē …£a, ariŇč s~…ēa ini Ē uwańß na Ē qu …£ipun ńß…£a, nanak jaquw mnwańß m…£a…£a Ē s~…ēqu rjax na ma…£al ina Ē …£a nanu Ē s~…ēi kij min ĒariŇč mtalańß l…£a jas~…ēa qu mutuw mzju…£i Ē. mnńßńßwaj qmara Ē, ńßmkuj tari Ē, ms~…ētawput(ms~…ēttazil) s~…ēun mańßa zju…£i Ē na tajal ő≤alaj ńßja Ē …£a, nanu Ē qu s~…ēun mańßa mnńßńßwaj qmara Ē ka jas~…ēa s~…ēij s~…ē Ērux ini Ē Ēnrawmul ijal, ruw mnńßawńßwaj mkura Ē taj Ēzil, ini Ē …£a taj Ēllaw ms~…ēńßzi Ē. ńßmkuj tari Ē ńßja Ē …£a mnrawmul ¶~ ®ikaj ńßwinuk nańßa Ē ru ńßkuzjun ¶~ ®ikaj qu tari Ē, mkura Ē ¶~ ®ikaj taj …£laiŇč rmuruw s~…ēqu pńßkŇčjan nańßa Ē. ms~…ētawput /ms~…ēttazil ńßija Ē …£a, wij ms~…ētawput taj Ēzil, ini Ē …£a ms~…ētawput taj Ēllaw. ¶~ ®ju…£al qu …£luw na zju…£i Ē qani. ana maki Ē s~…ēa ppzju…£i Ē nańßa Ē …£a, mtnaq kwara Ē qu pps~…ētawput na zju…£i Ē nańßa Ē ńßja Ē. nanu Ē ij mzju…£i Ē …£a, mutuw jaqu zju…£i Ē na mnńßńßwaj qmara Ē qu tqs~…ē Ēun nańßa Ē pzju…£i Ē ńßa, ruw jaqu zju…£i Ē na ńßmkuj tari Ē qu s~…ēpzju…£i Ē nańßa Ē la, ruw pu ¶~ ®iŇč ő≤alaj l…£a, nanu Ē jaqu ms~…ētawput /ms~…ēttazil lqu s~…ēpzju…£i Ē nańßa Ē lma. kruma Ē …£a mutuw jaqu mnńßńßwaj qmara Ē s~…ēqu ńßmkuj tari Ē nanak qu s~…ēpzju…£i Ē nańßa Ē, …£a ini Ē nańßa Ē ani pzju…£i Ē qu ms~…ētawput /ms~…ēttazil ńßja Ē, …£a kja uzi qu nanak jaqu mnńßńßwaj qmara Ē qani qu s~…ēpzju…£i Ē nańßa Ē nanak. nanu Ē mzju…£i Ē nqu ms~…ētawput /ms~…ēttazil …£a mutuw s~…ēij ps~…ē Ēanak s~…ēmi Ē s~…ēa ńßwinuk qő≤a Ē nańßa Ē, ru mluw s~…ēqu ńßŇčzjaŇč qwas~…ē qu ju…£i Ē nańßa Ē, ruw. lawkańß ms~…ētawput s~…ēqu muwańß pzju…£i Ē. nanu Ē pzju…£i Ē s~…ēqu zju…£i Ē ńßmkuj tari Ē …£a, nanu Ē llajqun nańßa Ē qu kakaj taj Ēzil ńßru knrrŇču Ē ms~…ētawput na kakaj Ēllaw, ru iju…£un nańßa Ē lmajliq qu kakaj taj Ēllaw l…£a, knrrŇču Ē ms~…ētawput na kakaj taj Ēzil, nanu Ē ps~…ē Ēaj Ēiju…£un nańßa Ē pzju…£i Ē na ńßmkuj tari Ē s~…ēqu ms~…ētawput ru mŇčaj…£jut mkkura Ē taj Ēllaw ini Ē …£a mkkura Ē taj Ēzil. pzju…£i Ē qani …£a mtő≤u ¶~ ®i Ē ms~…ētawput mmlikuj s~…ēqu kknajril, kruma Ē …£a mŇčaj…£jut mtliő≤u Ē mtliŇčaj kruma Ē, ru mutuw s~…ē…£laiŇč mqwas~…ē nqu kja qu ő≤aq mqwas~…ē, ru …£l…£an nańßa Ē p…£ruw mqwas~…ē taj s~…ēuruw, kruma Ē …£a p…£l…£an nańßa Ē tluő≤uw na luő≤uw uzi kruma Ē mzju…£i Ē. kinő≤laq ktan zju…£i Ē na tajal mzju…£i Ē s~…ēun na tajal ńßja Ē …£a, ariŇč s~…ēa ini Ē uwańß na Ē qu …£ipun ńß…£a, nanak jaquw mnwańß m…£a…£a Ē s~…ēqu rjax na ma…£al ina Ē …£a nanu Ē s~…ēi kij min ĒariŇč mtalańß l…£a jas~…ēa qu mutuw mzju…£i Ē. s~…ēun mańßa zju…£i Ē na tajal ő≤alaj ńßja Ē …£a, nanu Ē qu s~…ēun ru ńßkuzjun ¶~ ®ikaj qu tari Ē, mkura Ē ¶~ ®ikaj taj …£laiŇč rmuruw s~…ēqu pńßkŇčjan nańßa Ē. ms~…ētawput /ms~…ēttazil ńßija Ē …£a, wij ms~…ētawput taj Ēzil, ini Ē …£a ms~…ētawput taj Ēllaw. ¶~ Ē nańßa Ē, ruw. lawkańß ms~…ētawput s~…ēqu muwańß pzju…£i Ē. nanu Ē pzju…£i Ē s~…ēqu zju…£i Ē ńßmkuj tari Ē …£a, nanu Ē llajqun nańßa Ē qu kakaj taj Ēzil ńßru knrrŇču Ē ms~…ētawput na kakaj Ēllaw, ru iju…£un nańßa Ē lmajliq qu kakaj taj Ēllaw l…£a, knrrŇču Ē ms~…ētawput na kakaj taj Ēzil, nanu Ē ps~…ē Ēaj Ēiju…£un nańßa Ē pzju…£i Ē na ńßmkuj tari Ē s~…ēqu ms~…ētawput ru mŇčaj…£jut mkkura Ē taj ő≤aq mqwas~…ē, ru …£l…£an nańßa Ē p…£ruw mqwas~…ē taj s~…ēuruw, kruma Ē …£a p…£l…£an nańßa Ē tluő≤uw na luő≤uw uzi kruma Ē mzju…£i Ē. kinő≤laq ktan zju…£i Ē na tajal zju…£i Ē na tajal qani ńßja Ē …£a, mutuw nańßa Ē s~…ēp…£luw pzju…£i Ē s~…ēa qwas~…ē, …£auŇčat ijal qu s~…ēp…£luw nańßa Ē s~…ēa ńßŇčzjaŇč na luő≤uw na mnnanak ńßja Ē. nanu Ē qu mutuw nańßa Ē s~…ēp…£luw s~…ēa zju…£i Ē nańßa Ē ka luő≤uw ńßja Ē …£a, nanak ja Ēqu luő≤uw na tajal nanak ru uŇčat kwra Ē mnnanak na luő≤uw ńßja Ē la.
S.FORM: mzyugi' sun na Tayal hya' ga, aring sa ini' uwah na' qu Gipun hga, nanak yaquw mnwah mgaga' squ ryax na magal ina' ga nanu' si kiy min'aring mtalah lga yasa qu mutuw mzyugi'. mnhhway qmara', hmkuy tari', mstawput(msttazil) sun maha zyugi' na Tayal balay hya' ga, nanu' qu sun maha mnhhway qmara' ka yasa siy s'rux ini' 'nrawmul iyal, ruw mnhawhway mkura' tay 'zil, ini' ga tay 'llaw mshzi'. hmkuy tari' hya' ga mnrawmul cikay hwinuk naha' ru hkuzyun cikay qu tari', mkura' cikay tay glaing rmuruw squ phkngyan naha'. mstawput /msttazil hiya' ga, wiy mstawput tay 'zil, ini' ga mstawput tay 'llaw. cyugal qu gluw na zyugi' qani. Ana maki' sa ppzyugi' naha' ga, mtnaq kwara' qu ppstawput na zyugi' naha' hya'. nanu' iy mzyugi' ga, mutuw yaqu zyugi' na mnhhway qmara' qu tqs'un naha' pzyugi' ha, ruw yaqu zyugi' na hmkuy tari' qu spzyugi' naha' la, ruw pucing balay lga, nanu' yaqu mstawput /msttazil lqu spzyugi' naha' lma. Kruma' ga mutuw yaqu mnhhway qmara' squ hmkuy tari' nanak qu spzyugi' naha', ga ini' naha' ani pzyugi' qu mstawput /msttazil hya', ga kya uzi qu nanak yaqu mnhhway qmara' qani qu spzyugi' naha' nanak. nanu' mzyugi' nqu mstawput /msttazil ga mutuw siy ps'anak smi' sa hwinuk qba' naha', ru mluw squ hngzyang qwas qu yugi' naha', ruw. lawkah mstawput squ muwah pzyugi'. nanu' pzyugi' squ zyugi' hmkuy tari' ga, nanu' llayqun naha' qu kakay tay 'zil hru knrrngu' mstawput na kakay 'llaw, ru iyugun naha' lmayliq qu kakay tay 'llaw lga, knrrngu' mstawput na kakay tay 'zil, nanu' ps'ay'iyugun naha' pzyugi' na hmkuy tari' squ mstawput ru mngaygyut mkkura' tay 'llaw ini' ga mkkura' tay 'zil. pzyugi' qani ga mtbuci' mstawput mmlikuy squ kknayril, kruma' ga mngaygyut mtlibu' mtlingay kruma', ru mutuw sglaing mqwas nqu kya qu baq mqwas, ru glgan naha' pgruw mqwas tay suruw, kruma' ga pglgan naha' tlubuw na lubuw uzi kruma' mzyugi'. kinblaq ktan zyugi' na Tayal mzyugi' sun na Tayal hya' ga, aring sa ini' uwah na' qu Gipun hga, nanak yaquw mnwah mgaga' squ ryax na magal ina' ga nanu' si kiy min'aring mtalah lga yasa qu mutuw mzyugi'. sun maha zyugi' na Tayal balay hya' ga, nanu' qu sun maha mnhhway qmara' ka yasa siy s'rux ini' 'nrawmul iyal, ruw mnhawhway mkura' tay 'zil, ini' ga tay 'llaw mshzi'. hmkuy tari' hya' ga mnrawmul cikay hwinuk naha' ru hkuzyun cikay qu tari', mkura' cikay tay glaing rmuruw squ phkngyan naha'. mstawput /msttazil hiya' ga, wiy mstawput tay 'zil, ini' ga mstawput tay 'llaw. cyugal qu gluw na zyugi' qani. Ana maki' sa ppzyugi' naha' ga, mtnaq kwara' qu ppstawput na zyugi' naha' hya'. nanu' iy mzyugi' ga, mutuw yaqu zyugi' na mnhhway qmara' qu tqs'un naha' pzyugi' ha, ruw yaqu zyugi' na hmkuy tari' qu spzyugi' naha' la, ruw pucing balay lga, nanu' yaqu mstawput /msttazil lqu spzyugi' naha' lma. Kruma' ga mutuw yaqu mnhhway qmara' squ hmkuy tari' nanak qu spzyugi' naha', ga ini' naha' ani pzyugi' qu mstawput /msttazil hya', ga kya uzi qu nanak yaqu mnhhway qmara' qani qu spzyugi' naha' nanak. nanu' mzyugi' nqu mstawput /msttazil ga mutuw siy ps'anak smi' sa hwinuk qba' naha', ru mluw squ hngzyang qwas qu yugi' naha', ruw. lawkah mstawput squ muwah pzyugi'. nanu' pzyugi' squ zyugi' hmkuy tari' ga, nanu' llayqun naha' qu kakay tay 'zil hru knrrngu' mstawput na kakay 'llaw, ru iyugun naha' lmayliq qu kakay tay 'llaw lga, knrrngu' mstawput na kakay tay 'zil, nanu' ps'ay'iyugun naha' pzyugi' na hmkuy tari' squ mstawput ru mngaygyut mkkura' tay 'llaw ini' ga mkkura' tay 'zil. pzyugi' qani ga mtbuci' mstawput mmlikuy squ kknayril, kruma' ga mngaygyut mtlibu' mtlingay kruma', ru mutuw sglaing mqwas nqu kya qu baq mqwas, ru glgan naha' pgruw mqwas tay suruw, kruma' ga pglgan naha' tlubuw na lubuw uzi kruma' mzyugi'. kinblaq ktan zyugi' na Tayal zyugi' na Tayal qani hya' ga, mutuw naha' spgluw pzyugi' sa qwas, gaungat iyal qu spgluw naha' sa hngzyang na lubuw na mnnanak hya'. nanu' qu mutuw naha' spgluw sa zyugi' naha' ka lubuw hya' ga, nanak ya'qu lubuw na Tayal nanak ru ungat kwra' mnnanak na lubuw hya' la.

tari Ē nanak qu s~…ēpzju…£i Ē nańßa Ē, …£a ini Ē nańßa Ē ani pzju…£i Ē qu ms~…ētawput /ms~…ēttazil ńßja Ē, …£a kja uzi qu nanak jaqu mnńßńßwaj qmara Ē qani qu s~…ēpzju…£i Ē nańßa Ē nanak. nanu Ē
